invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破99.0（基于ATR和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.01%（空头平仓结束），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 99.0 (based on ATR and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.01% (short covering ends).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.099（基于ATR 0.0019和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.01%（空头平仓结束），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.099 (based on ATR 0.0019 and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.01% (short covering ends).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破2350.0（基于ATR $38.5和支撑位）或融资费率转负超过-0.01%（空头压力加剧），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 2350.0 (based on ATR $38.5 and support) or funding rate turns negative below -0.01% (short pressure intensifies).
